extraction_rules.subject_extraction: Each row represents a PolicyProgram entity identified by the '纲领' column (program name) and '纲领编号' column (program ID). Create one PolicyProgram node per row with properties: program_id (from 纲领编号), program_name (from 纲领).
extraction_rules.value_extraction: Each numeric cell represents a BudgetAmount entity with properties: amount (numeric value), currency ('百万元'/'million HKD'), budget_type (actual/original/revised/planned based on column header). Create separate BudgetAmount nodes for each non-empty numeric value.
extraction_rules.time_handling: Extract fiscal year from column headers: '2022-23(实际)' → FiscalYear{year:'2022-23', type:'actual'}, '2023-24(原来预算)' → FiscalYear{year:'2023-24', type:'original_budget'}, '2023-24(修订)' → FiscalYear{year:'2023-24', type:'revised'}, '2024-25(预算)' → FiscalYear{year:'2024-25', type:'planned'}. Create FiscalYear nodes for each unique year-type combination.

prompt_context: 这是一个政府部门预算表，记录了不同政策纲领(PolicyProgram)在多个财政年度的预算数据。每一行代表一个政策纲领，由纲领编号和纲领名称唯一标识。列标题包含四个时间维度：2022-23(实际)、2023-24(原来预算)、2023-24(修订)、2024-25(预算)，每个时间维度对应一个FiscalYear实体。每个单元格中的数值代表一个BudgetAmount实体，单位为百万港元。提取时需要创建以下关系：PolicyProgram通过HAS_BUDGET关系连接到BudgetAmount，BudgetAmount通过BELONGS_TO_FISCAL_YEAR关系连接到对应的FiscalYear。根据列标题的预算类型，使用ACTUAL_AMOUNT(实际)、ORIGINAL_BUDGET(原来预算)、REVISED_BUDGET(修订)或PLANNED_BUDGET(预算)等更具体的关系类型来描述PolicyProgram与BudgetAmount之间的关系。确保每个BudgetAmount节点包含amount(数值)、currency(百万元)和budget_type(actual/original_budget/revised/planned)属性。

_meta_schema.extraction_rule_summary: Each row is an entity identified by "纲领"; 4 time-period column(s) in the header hold numeric values.

entity_extraction_template: For each row, extract the value of '纲领' as a Policy_Program entity node.
relation_extraction_template: For each time column, create: (Policy_Program) -[HAS_BUDGET {year: X, status: Y, unit: Z}]-> (value). Example time columns: {2022-23, 实际, 百万元}; {2023-24, 原来预算, 百万元}; {2023-24, 修订, 百万元}.
